top_signals.title: Qatar Domestic Gas Plant Malfunction Blast Leaves 18 Missing
top_signals.summary: Qatar said an incident during the startup of the Ras Laffan industrial complex resulted in a blast that has injured dozens, underscoring the risks to Middle East energy facilities as they ramp up production after the US-Iran ceasefire.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil Falls, Asia Stocks Rise as Iran Talks Progress: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Oil gave up early gains and Asian stocks advanced as investors welcomed signs of progress in diplomatic talks between the US and Iran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Italy rejects aid scheme that buys US weapons for Ukraine’s defense
top_signals.summary: NATO has said the Prioritised Ukraine Requirements List (PURL) mechanism has helped fund the purchase of air-defense systems, in particular.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin price is down over 40% since STRC launched: Is Strategy 'fine'?
top_signals.summary: STRC’s slide below par has emboldened critics, slowed Strategy’s Bitcoin buys and sparked debate over whether Michael Saylor’s BTC flywheel is still fine.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
